message:
🐛 Fix user count not working in demo mode on console.kubestellar.io (#631)

The user count was stuck at 1 because:
1. Demo mode forces heartbeat-based tracking instead of WebSocket presence
2. Frontend sends POST requests to /api/active-users with session IDs
3. Backend only had a GET handler - POST requests failed silently
4. GET handler returned WebSocket hub count (always 0-1 in demo mode)

Fix:
- Add demoSessions map to Hub for tracking heartbeat sessions
- Add POST handler for /api/active-users to record session heartbeats
- Update GET handler to return demo session count when higher than WS count
- Sessions expire after 60 seconds of inactivity

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
